retrieved_result: How do geodatabases use Oracle Spatial? How do geodatabases use Oracle Spatial? Geodata » Administering geodatabases » Geodatabases in Oracle » Inside a geodatabase in Oracle Arc GIS supports Oracle Spatial or Oracle Locator for storing and managing geometry in a geodatabase in Oracle. To use it in a geodatabase, you must have SDO_GEOMET
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Oracle Spatial geodatabases, unrelated to IDEs or software development environments, thus not relevant to the query.
